name: Ovenbaked Christmas Ham (Ugnsbakad Julskinka)
recipeInstructions:
1. Place the ham, rind up, on a rack in a roasting pan lined with aluminium foil.
2. Insert a meat thermometer into the thickest part of the ham.
3. Bake in a 150°C oven for 60-75 minutes per kilogram or until the thermometer reads 75°C.
4. Remove the rind and brush the top of the ham with the egg yolk, sugar, and mustard stirred together.
5. Sprinkle with bread crumbs.
6. Bake at 225°C until golden brown.
7. Garnish with kale, prunes, and an apple or orange.
8. Serve cold, cut into slices. The ham might be baked wrapped in aluminium foil; use a 175°C oven if so. Lightly smoked ham might be prepared the same way.
